title: ursinia albicaulis
intro: Ursinia albicaulis, also known as the white-stemmed daisy or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ursinia albicaulis include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be dried and used as a powder for various applications.
